title: OKX DEX - REKT
relevance_summary: Proxy admin upgrade to steal user funds via trusted contract

prevention.rule: Block any tx that upgrades a trusted contract with a known vulnerable pattern.
prevention.trigger: UPGRADE -> trusted contract with known vulnerable pattern

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that upgrades a trusted contract with a known vulnerable pattern.
summary: OKX DEX lost $2.7M due to a compromised proxy admin upgrading the contract to steal user funds. A guard could have blocked the upgrade transaction.
